summary: Tested Feature #4: Script Cleaning + Review/Edit/Confirm. Backend: 14/14 pytest tests passed against live API (clean, clean-all, confirm, confirm-all, GET document). Cleaning rules verified: page-number stripping, '20INT.' -> 'INT.', (MORE)/(CONT'D) join, blank-line collapse, blank line before character names. Confirmation persists cleaned_text + is_confirmed=true; clean-all returns the persisted (confirmed) text rather than re-cleaning. Frontend: full mobile flow at 390x844 verified — Home -> New Audition -> Create -> Paste Text (x2) -> Continue -> DocumentReview, with Edit/Preview toggle, Edited badge, Reset (toast 'Reset to auto-cleaned version.'), Confirm This Document (Confirmed badge), Confirm All, and 'Continue — All Confirmed' all working.
passed_tests: POST /api/documents/{id}/clean returns cleaned_text + lengths
POST /api/documents/{id}/clean strips standalone page-number lines (15./16.)
POST /api/documents/{id}/clean fixes '20INT.' to 'INT.'
POST /api/documents/{id}/clean removes (MORE) marker, joins CONT'D
POST /api/documents/{id}/clean collapses 3+ blank lines
POST /api/documents/{id}/clean ensures blank line before character name
POST /api/documents/{id}/clean returns 404 for unknown id
POST /api/projects/{id}/clean-all returns documents array with required fields
POST /api/projects/{id}/clean-all returns 404 for unknown project
POST /api/documents/{id}/confirm persists cleaned_text and is_confirmed=true (verified via GET)
POST /api/documents/{id}/confirm returns 404 for unknown id
POST /api/projects/{id}/clean-all returns persisted cleaned_text after confirm (no re-clean)
POST /api/projects/{id}/confirm-all batch confirms all docs
POST /api/projects/{id}/confirm-all returns 400 for empty documents array
Frontend mobile (390x844): Home loads, New Audition flow
Frontend: Project create + role name fill + Create button works
Frontend: DocumentUpload paste-text flow uploads document
Frontend: Continue navigates to DocumentReview
Frontend: review-preview shows cleaned text (no '20INT.', no '(MORE)', no '15.' lines)
Frontend: Edit toggle reveals review-textarea
Frontend: Edited badge appears on text change
Frontend: Reset reverts text to auto-cleaned version
Frontend: Toggle back to Preview works
Frontend: Confirm This Document shows Confirmed badge
Frontend: Confirm All works for batch
Frontend: 'Continue — All Confirmed' appears once all confirmed
Frontend: All controls usable at 390px viewport
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~2920 lines — consider splitting into routers (projects, documents, cleaning, scripts) per the >700 line guideline.
POST /api/projects/{id}/confirm-all uses request: dict (untyped). Pydantic model would give validation + OpenAPI docs (matches the ConfirmDocumentRequest pattern used for /confirm).

clean_all endpoint re-runs clean_script_text() on every doc on every call even when is_confirmed=True. Optimization: skip cleaning when doc has stored cleaned_text (tiny, but matches the contract that confirmed text is the source of truth).
Confirm-all silently ignores docs missing 'cleaned_text' (truthy check on ct). Empty-string is allowed only via doc-level confirm. Consider explicit response with skipped count for transparency.

DocumentReview transient overlay: just-uploaded toast can intercept clicks on toggle-edit-btn briefly — first run failed because of this. Consider auto-dismiss faster or pointer-events:none on toast container so e2e is more deterministic.
seed_data_creation: TEST_clean_* and TEST_edit_* projects created via API/UI. Backend test cleans up its project; UI test projects remain (small, with only pasted text).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Feature #4 fully verified. Endpoints: /api/documents/{id}/clean, /api/projects/{id}/clean-all, /api/documents/{id}/confirm (body {cleaned_text}), /api/projects/{id}/confirm-all (body {documents:[{doc_id, cleaned_text}]}). Frontend testids: paste-submit-btn, continue-btn, document-review, toggle-edit-btn, review-textarea, review-preview, confirm-doc-btn, confirm-all-btn, reset-btn, confirmed-badge, edited-badge. Note: just-uploaded sonner toast can transiently overlay buttons on review screen — wait ~2s after second upload before clicking Continue/Edit if writing UI tests.
